category.scope_note: Filtering facepiece respirator (FFP mask) compliance comparison: China domestic (GB 2626 KN95 / GB 19083) to the Sultanate of Oman (MOCIIP / DGSM conformity, GSO standards adopting EN 149, Ministry of Labour occupational framework).

title.en: China-to-Oman PPE Respirator (FFP Mask) Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国口罩呼吸器进入阿曼（FFP）：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國口罩呼吸器進入阿曼（FFP）：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese PPE respirator (KN95 / GB 2626) documentation against Oman market requirements: MOCIIP / DGSM conformity, GSO Gulf standards adopting EN 149 (FFP1/FFP2/FFP3), the Ministry of Labour occupational safety framework, importer obligations, and the boundary with medical masks regulated by the national health authority.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件与阿曼市场要求对照，涵盖MOCIIP/DGSM合格评定、采纳EN 149的海湾GSO标准（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）、劳工部职业安全框架、进口商义务，以及与由国家卫生主管部门监管的医用口罩之间的界定。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件與阿曼市場要求對照，涵蓋MOCIIP/DGSM合格評定、採納EN 149的海灣GSO標準（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）、勞工部職業安全框架、進口商義務，以及與由國家衛生主管部門監管的醫用口罩之間的界定。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment determination, customs ruling, or market-access approval for Oman. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Omani law, MOCIIP / DGSM conformity and registration procedures, applicable GSO standards, and destination-country market surveillance practice with qualified regulatory professionals before shipment or placing products on the market. The PPE-vs-medical mask boundary described herein requires case-by-case legal and regulatory analysis.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成针对阿曼的认证结论、法律意见、合格评定裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商及分销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格的法规专业人士核验现行阿曼法律、MOCIIP/DGSM合格评定与注册程序、适用的GSO标准及目的地国市场监督实践。本文所述的PPE与医用口罩界定需要逐案进行法律及法规分析。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成針對阿曼的認證結論、法律意見、合格評定裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商及分銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格的法規專業人士核驗現行阿曼法律、MOCIIP/DGSM合格評定與註冊程序、適用的GSO標準及目的地國市場監督實踐。本文所述的PPE與醫用口罩界定需要逐案進行法律及法規分析。

answer_first.en: FFP respirators entering Oman as PPE are regulated through MOCIIP and the Directorate General for Standards and Metrology (DGSM), which adopts GSO Gulf standards aligned to EN 149 (FFP1/FFP2/FFP3) for filtering facepieces. Conformity/registration is handled at import via a locally established importer; occupational use sits under the Ministry of Labour framework. Chinese KN95 (GB 2626) test reports do not by themselves satisfy the GSO/EN 149 conformity route. Medical masks are regulated separately by the national health authority, not as occupational PPE.
answer_first.zh: 作为PPE进入阿曼的FFP呼吸器由工商投资促进部（MOCIIP）及标准与计量总局（DGSM）监管，DGSM对过滤式半面罩采纳与EN 149对齐的海湾GSO标准（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）。合格评定/注册在进口环节通过本地设立的进口商完成；职业使用归劳工部框架。中国KN95（GB 2626）检测报告本身不满足GSO/EN 149合格评定路径。医用口罩由国家卫生主管部门单独监管，而非作为职业PPE。
answer_first.zht: 作為PPE進入阿曼的FFP呼吸器由工商投資促進部（MOCIIP）及標準與計量總局（DGSM）監管，DGSM對過濾式半面罩採納與EN 149對齊的海灣GSO標準（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）。合格評定/註冊在進口環節通過本地設立的進口商完成；職業使用歸勞工部框架。中國KN95（GB 2626）檢測報告本身不滿足GSO/EN 149合格評定路徑。醫用口罩由國家衛生主管部門單獨監管，而非作為職業PPE。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true. Official regulator (MOCIIP / DGSM), GSO standards body, or primary legal source preferred.
